_comment: Deterministic priority/referral tag. A listing is flagged priority when its annualized USD salary >= hourly_threshold*2080, OR its company is in allowlist. Company match is case/punctuation-insensitive (e.g. 'Jane Street' == 'janestreet'). allowlist folds together the FAANG+/Quant tiers and any other companies worth a referral. Edit freely.
